meta.homeTitle: Playa Venao Adventures | Pacific Coast Escape in Panama
meta.homeDescription: A hidden gem in Central America. Wild nature, open ocean, mountains and waterfalls — all in one place.

footer.tagline: Playa Venao, Panama — an experience, not just a destination
footer.copyright: © 2026 Playa Venao Adventures. All rights reserved.

hero.title: Playa Venao, Panama — Your Perfect Escape on the Pacific Coast
hero.subtitle: A hidden gem in Central America. Wild nature, open ocean, mountains and waterfalls — all in one place.

vibe.title: The Vibe
vibe.text: Calm days, social nights. The perfect balance between quiet and connection. Slow mornings, sea air and nature. Evenings with people, music and good energy. Come solo, as a couple, or with your best friends — either way you'll never feel alone. It's easy to meet new people, and the overall feeling is less 'tourist' and more like joining a different way of life. Barefoot walks, laptops by the sea, sunset surf sessions and evenings together at beach bars.

local.title: Local Knowledge
local.body: We know Playa Venao, Panama up close — local knowledge that makes all the difference.

care.title: We Handle Everything
care.body: We take care of everything for you, from logistics to the smallest details.

personal.title: Personalized
personal.body: A trip tailored exactly to you. Solo, as a couple, or as a family — we customize everything. You focus on the experience; we handle the rest.

about.title: About Us
about.intro: Playa Venao Adventures — your team for an authentic Panama vacation. We connect people, nature and experiences — without feeling like tourists.
about.body: Playa Venao is more than a surf destination. It's an international community, a boho-chic beach vibe, and a lifestyle that blends work, adventure and rest. We're here to plan, book and care for everything — so you can simply be.

lodging.title: Lodging Options
lodging.intro: Comfortable, pleasant places — all within walking distance of the beach. Travel your way, feel right at home.

hostels.title: Social Hostels
hostels.body: Ideal for solo travelers, surfers and those seeking a young, social atmosphere. Most are very close to the beach with shared lounges, pools, bars and weekly social events.

boutique.title: Beach Boutique Hotels
boutique.body: Perfect for couples and those seeking a calmer, design-forward stay. Private rooms, pools, restaurants and ocean views.

apartments.title: Apartments & Guest Complexes
apartments.body: Great for friend groups, families and longer stays. Includes kitchen, living room and workspaces for independent living.

villas.title: Private Jungle & Mountain Villas
villas.body: Quiet natural settings offering full privacy, open ocean views, sunsets, private pools and direct connection to tropical nature.

resorts.title: Resorts & Premium Experience
resorts.body: Full hospitality with pools, restaurants, spa areas, yoga spaces and direct beach access — everything in one place.

culinary.title: Culinary Destination
culinary.intro: Good food, great energy. Culinary abundance and good vibes all day long. Eat well, feel better, enjoy every moment.

yasu.name: Yasu
yasu.description: Modern Greek flavors on the waterfront. Fresh meals, tropical atmosphere, clean and vibrant.

sol.name: Sol
sol.description: Fresh bowls and tropical vibes. Light, colorful and full of energy.

coleos.name: Coleos
coleos.description: Middle Eastern with Asian touches. Comfort food exactly as it should be.

michaela.name: Michaela
michaela.description: Local flavors with a homestyle touch. Simple, fresh and full of taste.

surf.title: Surfing
surf.body: Playa Venao is one of Central America's most renowned and consistent surf destinations, with waves year-round for beginners and advanced surfers. Surf schools, camps (like SHOKOGI SURF SCHOOL), board rentals and a strong community.

nightlife.title: Nightlife
nightlife.body: Beach parties, pool parties, live shows, DJ nights and sunset parties in a free, international vibe.

waterfalls.title: Waterfall Tours
waterfalls.body: Hidden spots in Panama's jungles — refresh in natural, cool pools.

fishing.title: Fishing Trips
fishing.body: Head out to sea for a true local adventure (Tuna, Mahi Mahi, Snapper, Roosterfish) — relax and enjoy the ocean.

iguana.title: Isla Iguana
iguana.body: Crystal turquoise waters beside white sand. The perfect spot for snorkeling and relaxation.

horses.title: Horseback Riding
horses.body: Ride through wild nature with open panoramic views.

basic.title: Basic Vacation Package
basic.body: Includes lodging, trip planning and personalized transport options. Attractions booked separately based on weather.

full.title: Vacation Package with Attractions
full.body: Includes lodging and a variety of attractions and tours throughout your stay.

corporate.title: Corporate Events & Private Groups
corporate.body: Custom company retreats combining workspaces, group lodging, private meals, team activities, beach parties and wellness workshops.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Ready to plan your Playa Venao vacation? Talk to us — we'd love to help.
contact.formMessage: Tell us about the trip you're dreaming of
